title: Delay-repeated code is incorrectly output as "slow" code

features.name: initial forever loop with delay
features.description: Code should include an initial block containing a forever loop with a delay statement

features.name: fork-join-none with forever loops and delays
features.description: Code should include a fork-join_none block containing forever loops with delays
features.snippet: fork forever #1 a++; forever #2 b++; join_none
